description: Reserved bucket for questions whose current-schema mapping is unstable but whose conservative outcome is still well-defined (see SEMANTIC_PARSING_HARNESS_REFACTOR_SPEC §6.5). Empty in PR1 by design — re-annotation of the four needs_revision qids is deferred so PR1 stays a pure governance change. Populated by later PRs in SEMANTIC_PARSING_HARNESS_PR_PLAN.
